# Filters

- ✅ Parity: 59
- ☑️ Mock: 2
- Unsupported: 85
- **Total:** 146

| Filter                         |     | By       | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------------ | --- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `abs`                          | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the absolute value of a number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `append`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Adds a given string to the end of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `asset_img_url`                |     |          | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image in the [`assets` directory](/themes/architecture#assets) of a theme.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `asset_url`                    | ☑️  | Assay    | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a file in the [`assets` directory](/themes/architecture#assets) of a theme.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `at_least`                     | ✅  | LiquidJS | Limits a number to a minimum value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `at_most`                      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Limits a number to a maximum value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `avatar`                       |     |          | Generates HTML to render a customer's avatar, if available.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `base64_decode`                | ✅  | LiquidJS | Decodes a string in [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `base64_encode`                | ✅  | LiquidJS | Encodes a string to [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `base64_url_safe_decode`       |     |          | Decodes a string in URL-safe [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `base64_url_safe_encode`       |     |          | Encodes a string to URL-safe [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `blake3`                       |     |          | Converts a string into a Blake3 hash.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `brightness_difference`        |     |          | Calculates the [perceived brightness difference](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/WD-AERT/#color-contrast) between two colors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `camelize`                     |     |          | Converts a string to CamelCase.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `capitalize`                   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Capitalizes the first word in a string and downcases the remaining characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `ceil`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Rounds a number up to the nearest integer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_brightness`             |     |          | Calculates the [perceived brightness](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/WD-AERT/#color-contrast) of a given color.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_contrast`               |     |          | Calculates the contrast ratio between two colors and returns the ratio's numerator. The ratio's denominator, which isn't returned, is always 1. For example, with a contrast ratio of 3.5:1, this filter returns 3.5.                                                                                                                                 |
| `color_darken`                 |     |          | Darkens a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `color_desaturate`             |     |          | Desaturates a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `color_difference`             |     |          | Calculates the [color difference](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/WD-AERT/#color-contrast) between two colors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `color_extract`                |     |          | Extracts a specific color component from a given color.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `color_lighten`                |     |          | Lightens a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_mix`                    |     |          | Blends two colors together by a specific percentage factor. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `color_modify`                 |     |          | Modifies a specific color component of a given color by a specific amount.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_saturate`               |     |          | Saturates a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `color_to_hex`                 |     |          | Converts a CSS color string to hexadecimal format (`hex6`).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `color_to_hsl`                 |     |          | Converts a CSS color string to `HSL` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `color_to_oklch`               |     |          | Converts a CSS color string to `OKLCH` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `color_to_rgb`                 |     |          | Converts a CSS color string to `RGB` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `compact`                      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Removes any `nil` items from an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `concat`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Concatenates (combines) two arrays.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `customer_login_link`          |     |          | Generates an HTML link to the customer login page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `customer_logout_link`         |     |          | Generates an HTML link to log the customer out of their account and redirect to the homepage.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `customer_register_link`       |     |          | Generates an HTML link to the customer registration page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `date`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Converts a timestamp into another date format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `date`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Formats a date according to a specified format string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `default`                      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Sets a default value for any variable whose value is one of the following: - [`empty`](/docs/api/liquid/basics#empty) - [`false`](/docs/api/liquid/basics#truthy-and-falsy) - [`nil`](/docs/api/liquid/basics#nil)                                                                                                                                    |
| `default_errors`               |     |          | Generates default error messages for each possible value of [`form.errors`](/docs/themes/liquid/reference/objects/form#form-errors).                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `default_pagination`           |     |          | Generates HTML for a set of links for paginated results. Must be applied to the [`paginate` object](/docs/api/liquid/objects/paginate).                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `divided_by`                   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Divides a number by a given number. The `divided_by` filter produces a result of the same type as the divisor. This means if you divide by an integer, the result will be an integer, and if you divide by a float, the result will be a float.                                                                                                       |
| `downcase`                     | ✅  | LiquidJS | Converts a string to all lowercase characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `escape`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Escapes special characters in HTML, such as `&lt;&gt;`, `'`, and `&amp;`, and converts characters into escape sequences. The filter doesn't effect characters within the string that don’t have a corresponding escape sequence.".                                                                                                                    |
| `escape_once`                  | ✅  | LiquidJS | Escapes a string without changing characters that have already been escaped.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `external_video_tag`           |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;iframe&gt;` tag containing the player for a given external video. The input for the `external_video_tag` filter can be either a [`media` object](/docs/api/liquid/objects/media) or [`external_video_url`](/docs/api/liquid/filters/external_video_url).                                                                       |
| `external_video_url`           |     |          | Returns the URL for a given external video. Use this filter to specify parameters for the external video player generated by the [`external_video_tag` filter](/docs/api/liquid/filters/external_video_tag).                                                                                                                                          |
| `file_img_url`                 |     |          | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image from the [Files](https://www.shopify.com/admin/settings/files) page of the Shopify admin.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `file_url`                     |     |          | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a file from the [Files](https://www.shopify.com/admin/settings/files) page of the Shopify admin.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `find`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the first item in an array with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `find_index`                   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the index of the first item in an array with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `first`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the first item in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `floor`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `font_face`                    |     |          | Generates a CSS [`@font_face` declaration](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/%40font-face) to load the provided font.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `font_modify`                  |     |          | Modifies a specific property of a given font.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `font_url`                     |     |          | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for the provided font in `woff2` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `format_address`               |     |          | Generates an HTML address display, with each address component ordered according to the address's locale.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `global_asset_url`             |     |          | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a global asset.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `handleize`                    |     |          | Converts a string into a [handle](/docs/api/liquid/basics#handles).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `has`                          | ✅  | LiquidJS | Tests if any item in an array has a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `highlight`                    |     |          | Wraps all instances of a specific string, within a given string, with an HTML `&lt;strong&gt;` tag with a `class` attribute of `highlight`.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `highlight_active_tag`         |     |          | Wraps a given tag within the [`collection` object](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/collection) in an HTML `&lt;span&gt;` tag, with a `class` attribute of `active`, if the tag is currently active. Only applies to collection tags.                                                                                                      |
| `hmac_sha1`                    |     |          | Converts a string into an SHA-1 hash using a hash message authentication code (HMAC).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `hmac_sha256`                  |     |          | Converts a string into an SHA-256 hash using a hash message authentication code (HMAC).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `image_tag`                    |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;img&gt;` tag for a given [`image_url`](/docs/api/liquid/filters/image_url).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `image_url`                    |     |          | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `inline_asset_content`         |     |          | Outputs the content of an asset inline in the template. The asset must be either a SVG, JS, or CSS file.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `item_count_for_variant`       |     |          | Returns the total item count for a specified variant in the [`cart`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/cart) object.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `join`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Combines all of the items in an array into a single string, separated by a space.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `json`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Converts a string, or object, into JSON format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `last`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the last item in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `line_items_for`               |     |          | Returns the subset of [`cart`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/cart) line items that include a specified product or variant.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `link_to`                      |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `link_to_add_tag`              |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to the current blog or collection, filtered to show only articles or products that have a given tag, as well as any currently active tags.                                                                                                                                         |
| `link_to_remove_tag`           |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to the current blog or collection, filtered to show only articles or products that have any currently active tags, except the provided tag.                                                                                                                                        |
| `link_to_tag`                  |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to the current blog or collection, filtered to show only articles or products that have a given tag.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `link_to_type`                 |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products of the given product type.                                                                                                                           |
| `link_to_vendor`               |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products of a given product vendor.                                                                                                                           |
| `login_button`                 |     |          | Generates an HTML Button that enables a customer to either sign in to the storefront using their Shop account or follow the shop in the Shop App.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `lstrip`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Strips all whitespace from the left of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `map`                          | ✅  | LiquidJS | Creates an array of values from a specific property of the items in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `md5`                          |     |          | Converts a string into an MD5 hash. MD5 is not considered safe anymore. Please use ['blake3'](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/blake3) instead for better security and performance.                                                                                                                                                        |
| `media_tag`                    |     |          | Generates an appropriate HTML tag for a given media object.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `metafield_tag`                |     |          | Generates an HTML element to host the data from a [`metafield` object](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/metafield). The type of element that's generated differs depending on the type of metafield.                                                                                                                                       |
| `metafield_text`               |     |          | Generates a text version of the data from a [`metafield` object](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/metafield).                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `minus`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Subtracts a given number from another number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `model_viewer_tag`             |     |          | Generates a [Google model viewer component](https://modelviewer.dev/) for a given 3D model.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `modulo`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the remainder of dividing a number by a given number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `money`                        | ☑️  | Assay    | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting).                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `money_amount`                 |     |          | Formats a given price as a plain decimal string, without currency symbols, thousand separators, or locale formatting.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `money_with_currency`          |     |          | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML with currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting).                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `money_without_currency`       |     |          | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting), without the currency symbol.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `money_without_trailing_zeros` |     |          | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting), excluding the decimal separator (either `.` or `,`) and trailing zeros. If the price has a non-zero decimal value, then the output is the same as the [`money` filter](/docs/api/liquid/filters#money). |
| `newline_to_br`                | ✅  | LiquidJS | Converts newlines (`\n`) in a string to HTML line breaks (`&lt;br&gt;`).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `payment_button`               |     |          | Generates an HTML container to host [accelerated checkout buttons](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/dynamic-checkout) for a product. The `payment_button` filter must be used on the `form` object within a [product form](/docs/api/liquid/tags/form#form-product).                                                                      |
| `payment_terms`                |     |          | Generates the HTML for the [Shop Pay Installments banner](/themes/pricing-payments/installments).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `payment_type_img_url`         |     |          | Returns the URL for an SVG image of a given [payment type](/docs/api/liquid/objects/shop#shop-enabled_payment_types).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `payment_type_svg_tag`         |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;svg&gt;` tag for a given [payment type](/docs/api/liquid/objects/shop#shop-enabled_payment_types).                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `placeholder_svg_tag`          |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;svg&gt;` tag for a given placeholder name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `pluralize`                    |     |          | Outputs the singular or plural version of a string based on a given number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `plus`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Adds two numbers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `preload_tag`                  |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;link&gt;` tag with a `rel` attribute of `preload` to prioritize loading a given Shopify-hosted asset. The asset URL is also added to the [Link header](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Link) with a `rel` attribute of `preload`.                                                                    |
| `prepend`                      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Adds a given string to the beginning of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `reject`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Filters an array to exclude items with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `remove`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Removes any instance of a substring inside a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `remove_first`                 | ✅  | LiquidJS | Removes the first instance of a substring inside a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `remove_last`                  | ✅  | LiquidJS | Removes the last instance of a substring inside a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `replace`                      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Replaces any instance of a substring inside a string with a given string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `replace_first`                | ✅  | LiquidJS | Replaces the first instance of a substring inside a string with a given string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `replace_last`                 | ✅  | LiquidJS | Replaces the last instance of a substring inside a string with a given string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `reverse`                      | ✅  | LiquidJS | Reverses the order of the items in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `round`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Rounds a number to the nearest integer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `rstrip`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Strips all whitespace from the right of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `script_tag`                   |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;script&gt;` tag for a given resource URL. The tag has a `type` attribute of `text/javascript`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `sha1`                         |     |          | Converts a string into an SHA-1 hash. SHA-1 is not considered safe anymore. Please use ['blake3'](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/blake3) instead for better security and performance.                                                                                                                                                    |
| `sha256`                       |     |          | Converts a string into an SHA-256 hash. Please use ['blake3'](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/blake3) instead for better security and performance.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `shopify_asset_url`            |     |          | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a globally accessible Shopify asset.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `size`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the size of a string or array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `slice`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns a substring or series of array items, starting at a given 0-based index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `sort`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Sorts the items in an array in case-sensitive alphabetical, or numerical, order.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `sort_by`                      |     |          | Generates a collection URL with the provided `sort_by` parameter appended. This filter must be applied to the object property [`collection.url`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/collection#collection-url).                                                                                                                              |
| `sort_natural`                 | ✅  | LiquidJS | Sorts the items in an array in case-insensitive alphabetical order.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `split`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Splits a string into an array of substrings based on a given separator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `strip`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Strips all whitespace from the left and right of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `strip_html`                   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Strips all HTML tags from a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `strip_newlines`               | ✅  | LiquidJS | Strips all newline characters (line breaks) from a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `structured_data`              |     |          | Converts an object into a schema.org structured data format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `stylesheet_tag`               |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;link&gt;` tag for a given resource URL. The tag has the following parameters: \| Attribute \| Value \| \| --- \| --- \| \| `rel` \| `stylesheet` \| \| `type` \| `text/css` \| \| `media` \| `all` \|                                                                                                                          |
| `sum`                          | ✅  | LiquidJS | Returns the sum of all elements in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `time_tag`                     |     |          | Converts a timestamp into an HTML `&lt;time&gt;` tag.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `times`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Multiplies a number by a given number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `translate`                    |     |          | Returns a string of translated text for a given translation key from a [locale file](/themes/architecture/locales).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `truncate`                     | ✅  | LiquidJS | Truncates a string down to a given number of characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `truncatewords`                | ✅  | LiquidJS | Truncates a string down to a given number of words.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `uniq`                         | ✅  | LiquidJS | Removes any duplicate items in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `unit_price_with_measurement`  |     |          | Formats a given unit price and measurement based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting).                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `upcase`                       | ✅  | LiquidJS | Converts a string to all uppercase characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `url_decode`                   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Decodes any [percent-encoded](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/percent-encoding) characters in a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `url_encode`                   | ✅  | LiquidJS | Converts any URL-unsafe characters in a string to the [percent-encoded](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/percent-encoding) equivalent.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `url_escape`                   |     |          | Escapes any URL-unsafe characters in a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `url_for_type`                 |     |          | Generates a URL for a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products of the given product type.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `url_for_vendor`               |     |          | Generates a URL for a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products from the given product vendor.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `url_param_escape`             |     |          | Escapes any characters in a string that are unsafe for URL parameters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `video_tag`                    |     |          | Generates an HTML `&lt;video&gt;` tag for a given video.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `weight_with_unit`             |     |          | Generates a formatted weight for a [`variant` object](/docs/api/liquid/objects/variant#variant-weight). The weight unit is set in the [general settings](https://www.shopify.com/admin/settings/general) in the Shopify admin.                                                                                                                        |
| `where`                        | ✅  | LiquidJS | Filters an array to include only items with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `within`                       |     |          | Generates a product URL within the context of the provided collection.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

## Deprecated

| Filter               |     | By  | Description                                                                                                                                                      |
| -------------------- | --- | --- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `article_img_url`    |     |     | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an [article's image](/docs/api/liquid/objects/article#article-image).         |
| `collection_img_url` |     |     | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a [collection's image](/docs/api/liquid/objects/collection#collection-image). |
| `currency_selector`  |     |     | Generates an HTML `&lt;select&gt;` element with an option for each currency available on the store.                                                              |
| `hex_to_rgba`        |     |     | Converts a CSS color string from hexadecimal format to `RGBA` format. Shorthand hexadecimal formatting (`hex3`) is also accepted.                                |
| `img_tag`            |     |     | Generates an HTML `&lt;img&gt;` tag for a given image URL.                                                                                                       |
| `img_url`            |     |     | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image.                                                                     |
| `product_img_url`    |     |     | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a [product image](/docs/api/liquid/objects/product).                          |
